mapper.select:
SELECT concat(p.path, '@USE@', p.method) FROM
p LEFT JOIN md_auth_menu_permission mamp ON (p.id = mamp.permission_id) LEFT JOIN md_role_auth mra ON (mamp.auth_id = mra.auth_id) LEFT JOIN md_auth ma ON (mra.auth_id = ma.id) WHERE mra.role_id = #{roleId} AND ma.status = 1 GROUP BY p.id

SELECT mutr.tenant_id FROM
p LEFT JOIN md_auth_menu_permission mamp ON (p.id = mamp.permission_id) LEFT JOIN md_role_auth mra ON (mamp.auth_id = mra.auth_id) LEFT JOIN md_user_tenant_role mutr ON (mra.role_id = mutr.role_id) LEFT JOIN md_role mr ON (mutr.role_id = mr.id) WHERE p.path = #{path} AND mutr.app_id = #{appId} AND mutr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.status = 1
